name: Flashpoint
description: This app implements the investigative actions for the Flashpoint on the Phantom Platform

actions.name: List Reports
actions.description: Fetch a list of all the intelligence reports from the Flashpoint Platform

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reports to be fetched (default: 500)

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Fetch a specific intelligence report from the Flashpoint Platform for the provided report ID

actions.name: List Related Reports
actions.description: Fetch a list of all the related intelligence reports from the Flashpoint Platform for the provided report ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reports to be fetched (default: 500)

actions.name: Get Compromised Credentials
actions.description: Fetch a list of all the Credential Sightings from the Flashpoint Platform

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filtering the data of credentials sightings

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reports to be fetched (default: 500)

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Fetch the data by performing a universal search from the Flashpoint Platform

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search across all fields in the marketplace or free text search

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reports to be fetched (default: 500)

actions.name: List Indicators
actions.description: Fetch a list of IoCs that occur in the context of an event from the Flashpoint Platform

parameters.name: attributes_types
parameters.description: Enable a search by attribute types(allows Comma-separated list)

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Filter the results based on the field value or free text search

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of indicators to be fetched (default: 500)

actions.name: Search Indicators
actions.description: Fetch an IoC value of a specific attribute type from the list of available IoCs on the Flashpoint Platform

parameters.name: attribute_type
parameters.description: Retrieve specific indicator's attribute type result

parameters.name: attribute_value
parameters.description: Retrieve specific indicator's attribute type result based on the provided value

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reports to be fetched (default: 500)
